statement: The shifted-Xi positive kernel family gives the endpoint zero-location consequence: all zeros of Xi(z)=xi(1/2+i z) are real.

shiftedXiKernelPositiveInputStatus.label: shifted-Xi positive-kernel input
shiftedXiKernelPositiveInputStatus.reason: The shifted-Xi de Branges kernel is positive on every finite upper-half-plane evaluation set.

zeroLocationInputStatus.label: zero-location endpoint input
zeroLocationInputStatus.reason: The zero-descent endpoint theorem excludes non-real zeros of Xi.

rhZeroLocationConsequenceStatus.label: RH-side zero-location consequence
rhZeroLocationConsequenceStatus.reason: All Xi zeros are real in the z-normalization.

proof: Translate real zeros of Xi(z)=xi(1/2+i z) to the critical line for xi(s).
